## User Stories

- As a **Alice**, I want to perform an action so that I achieve a benefit.
- As a **Alice**, I want to perform an action so that I achieve a benefit.
- As a **Franklin**, I want to perform an action so that I achieve a benefit.

## Non-Functional Requirements

- **Availability:** 99.9% (monthly)
- **Latency:** P99 < 200 ms (read), P99 < 1 s (write)
- **Throughput:** 22849 req/s sustained
- **Durability:** 99.999999999% (11 nines) for writes
- **Compliance:** SOC 2 Type II, GDPR Art. 17 (right to erasure)

## Open Questions

- [ ] Should we use event sourcing or traditional CRUD?
- [ ] What is the retention policy for audit logs?
- [ ] Do we need real-time sync or is eventual consistency sufficient?
- [ ] Which identity provider should we federate with?
